diagnosis: Multi-output cross-entropy backward graph from GPT-J training. Oracle computes both indexed gradient rows, exponentiated residual terms, cat/view/permute layout, and the sibling [2] column-sum reduction in ONE Triton kernel. Inductor emits multiple scheduled kernels because it cannot fuse sibling scalar reductions with the layout-producing output when the downstream reduction reads through cat/view/permute structure. 3.77x real gap (19.2us) is a SCHEDULER_FUSION opportunity.
